text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, several boxes of fan mail arrive at the
academy, all addressed to Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'm... at a loss for words.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We have some time today before training, I
believe.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind if I read through these in the
meantime?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate it. These letters deserve my full
attention.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As we Umamusume race in the Twinkle Series, we
inspire dreams in the hearts of the fans who watch
us.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And in turn, their support becomes the wind at
our back, urging us ever onward in pursuit of our
own dreams.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That cycle is something I cherish dearly.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I wish to carry all my fans' support with me as I
move forward.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: To me, that is part of being an Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From the earnestness with which Symboli Rudolf
sits down to read, it's clear that she truly
treasures her fans.
